summary: Session-gated pricechange long with taker_buy and liquidity AND-stack — no integrity issues; standard paper-shadow monitoring concerns only.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields (session=US, taker_buy_ratio_5m, liquidity_bucket) are evaluable strictly at or before T0. `taker_buy_ratio_5m` references the trailing 5m window ending at T0, not a forward window; no `forward_*`, `confirm_after_*`, or `post_event_*` fields appear. Session is a deterministic clock-derived category. No future function detected.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Same channel (pricechange) and same side (long) as the live `BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long` strategy, so paper signals will overlap rather than oppose live positions — concurrent same-side stacking on the same symbol is the realistic scenario, not opposite-side conflict. Monitor as paper-shadow only.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required for integrity. Advisory: in paper-shadow tracking, log per-symbol concurrency and family-wise lift dilution vs the 61 existing OI_Price + 60 pricechange entry archetypes (high US-session liquidity bucket likely concentrates on BTC/ETH/SOL); flag if >2 same-symbol concurrent paper entries within a 15m window or if session-gated lift collapses to channel/side baseline once stacked with E051 (pc_high_liquidity_long) and E126/E064 (taker_buy variants).
